violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must register an employee certified in food safety management with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. Application provided. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025

An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

Deli meats observed not marked with the date of preparation/slicing. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared/sliced in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation/slicing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Establishment is to move dessert case behind the counter or contact supplier for proper labels. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

The door to the outside, located at the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New threshold is on-site and must be installed to make a tight seal. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the prep units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. These areas must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2026

Areas of the ceiling in the kitchen are covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Tiles are heavily soiled and unable to be cleaned effectively. Ceiling tiles are to be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment does not have an employee certified in food safety management that is registered with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025
Metal pitcher observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

Thermometers are lacking in refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

The door to the outside, located at the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets of the walk-in cooler and prep units were observed in poor repair, splitting away from the doors. Gaskets are to be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024

Individual cutting boards and prep unit cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024

Faucet of 3-bay sink observed in poor repair. Electrical tape observed around the faucet. Tape is not smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. Faucet is to be properly repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024
The ceiling in the kitchen is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Tiles are heavily stained and must be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Per interview, the dessert refrigerator will be relocated to behind the service counter. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024

The door to the outside, located at the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024

The individual cutting boards as well as the prep unit cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets of the pizza prep unit and the walk-in cooler were observed in poor repair, splitting away from the doors. Gaskets are to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Test strips must be obtained. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024
The faucet of the 3-bay sink observed with electrical tape. Tape is not smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. Faucet must be properly repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024
The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. They are heavily stained and must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
